name: pr_tms_ls_rev
drl:
rule RJ when T0(f0 == true) then insertLogical(new T1("v", true)); end
rule ROBS when T1($x : f0, $y : f1) then end
_finding: Stated THEN logical of an equal fact (the reverse ordering of pr_tms_ls_fwd): insertLogical onto an already-stated equality-key is a handle no-op (the ird_l3 recon rung) - ONE T1 for the whole run, and deleting the would-be justification premise retracts nothing. The forward/reverse cardinality asymmetry (2 vs 1) is a real property of Drools identity-mode TMS, pinned here as the pair.
